name: Marinated Pork Tenderloin
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in a bowl.
2. Place the marinade and 2 pork tenderloins (about 2 1/2 lbs each) in a ziplock bag.
3. Marinate for 2 to 3 days, turning occasionally.
4. Grill the marinated pork tenderloins for 6 minutes on each side.
5. Let the cooked pork cool completely.
6. Slice the cooled pork into 20 slices.
7. Return the sliced pork to the marinade and serve at room temperature.
